title: polypodium coriaceum
intro: Polypodium coriaceum, also known as the Leathery Polypody, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae, native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and the Pacific. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Polypodium coriaceum include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and relieve respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Polypodium coriaceum is often made into teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
